original_image_tags: The document is the reverse side of a page with multiple stamps indicating receipt by various offices. At the top right is a stamp for MR. JONES received June 11, 1964. Below that is a stamp for MR. JONES received June 5, 1964. In the middle left is a stamp for MR. JONES received May 27, 1964. Below that is a stamp for MR. JONES received May 25, 1964 at 7:20 PM. At the bottom left are three stamps: REC'D. BELMONT FBI-JUSTICE on May 25, 1964; REC'D-TOLSON'S OFFICE on May 25, 1964; and REC'D DE LOACH FBI on June 5, 1964. In the middle right is a stamp for MR. JONES received May 25, 1964 at 4:32 PM. The page has two hole-punch marks at the top center. There is faint reverse text visible from the other side of the page.

elements.description: Multiple overlapping blue ink reception stamps on the back of a document, showing various dates, times, and office names including 'MR. JONES', 'F.B.I.', 'REC'D - TOLSON'S OFFICE', 'REC'D - DE LOACH', and dates from May and June 1964.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (multiple reception stamps on the back of a document), the key entities quoted ('MR. JONES', 'REC'D - TOLSON'S OFFICE', 'REC'D - DE LOACH'), and the date range (May/June 1964), with no contradictions on any specific quoted text.
